commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Chrome MCP screenshot readback to use the requested/default format-suffixed temp file, adds a fake-session regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence current-main reproduction path: Chrome MCP writes `<filePath>.<format>` while OpenClaw reads the extensionless temporary path for existing-session screenshots.
